TC-S5-007-01.description: Upload document, restart app, verify document visible in frontend

TC-S5-007-02.description: Upload document, verify entry added to document_manifest.json

TC-S5-007-03.description: Manually add file to documents folder, restart app, verify file detected and added to manifest

TC-S5-007-04.description: Delete file from filesystem, restart app, verify marked as missing in logs (not shown in UI)

TC-S5-007-05.description: Document in manifest but missing from disk, verify startup logs warning 'Missing file: ...'

TC-S5-007-06.description: Multiple documents across cases, verify all loaded correctly on startup

TC-S5-007-07.description: Document with renders, restart app, verify render structure preserved

TC-S5-007-08.description: Check manifest file hash matches actual file, verify integrity validation

TC-S5-007-09.description: Corrupt manifest file, verify app creates new manifest from filesystem scan

TC-S5-007-10.description: GET /api/documents/tree/ACTE-2024-001, verify returns complete folder structure

TC-S5-007-11.description: Upload document, delete from manifest only (not disk), restart, verify re-added to manifest

TC-S5-007-12.description: Simulate container restart, verify all documents persist and load correctly
